optionA.text: Body slender, branchiae first present from setiger 18, or later, as thick filaments arranged with maximally two or three in a tuft

optionB.text: Body thick, branchiae first present from a more anterior setiger as thick tufts of very fine filaments

optionA.text: Neuropodia of branchial segment approach midventrally; a single pair of oesophageal sacs present

optionB.text: Neuropodia of branchial segments well separated; more than one pair of oesophageal sacs present
